notes: Public-source v0.1 database for the global aerospace stack.
This is a strategic dependency graph, not a supplier-contract database.
Edges marked fact_status=inferred are system-level dependency hypotheses.
Focus areas: OEMs, engines, tier-1 suppliers, MRO, certification, space, air traffic operations, sustainability and software/data opportunities.
Designed for Codex ingestion and website graph generation.
